ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "vehicle_number" INTEGER /* Identifier for the vehicle associated with the case */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the vehicle is registered */,
  "psu_id" INTEGER /* Primary Sampling Unit (PSU) associated with the vehicle */,
  "pj_id" INTEGER /* Subgroup identifier (PJ) associated with the vehicle */,
  "psu_variable" INTEGER /* Variable for PSU stratification */,
  "urbanicity_id" INTEGER /* Urbanicity classification of the vehicle's registration area */,
  "stratum_id" INTEGER /* Stratum identifier for stratified sampling */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was registered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the case was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the vehicle */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_pj_id FOREIGN KEY ("pj_id") REFERENCES pjs ("pj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_urbanicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("urbanicity_id") REFERENCES urbanicity ("urbanicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_vehicle_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_make_id") REFERENCES vehicle_makes ("vehicle_make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_vehicle_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("vehicle_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_psu_id FOREIGN KEY ("psu_id") REFERENCES psus ("psu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_stratum_id FOREIGN KEY ("stratum_id") REFERENCES strata ("stratum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the region */,
  "number_of_vehicles_registered" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles registered in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urbanicity" (
  "urbanicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urbanicity classification */,
  "urbanicity_type" TEXT /* Type of urbanicity (e.g., Urban, Suburban, Rural) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the urbanicity type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the urbanicity data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urbanicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strata" (
  "stratum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stratum */,
  "stratum_name" TEXT /* Name of the stratum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stratum */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the stratum data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stratum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psus" (
  "psu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PSU */,
  "psu_name" TEXT /* Name of the PSU */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the PSU represents */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the PSU */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the PSU in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the PSU data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("psu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pjs" (
  "pj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PJ */,
  "pj_name" TEXT /* Name of the PJ */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the PJ */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the PJ data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case associated with the weight */,
  "vehicle_weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in kilograms */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle weight was measured */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method used to measure the weight */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the weight data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weights_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weights_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the sampling variable data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_makes" (
  "vehicle_make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle make */,
  "vehicle_make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "vehicle_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "vehicle_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle model */,
  "vehicle_make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_models_vehicle_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_make_id") REFERENCES vehicle_makes ("vehicle_make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
